_notes.gemini_vision_env: Requires GEMINI_API_KEY exported in your shell. Free tier 15 req/min. Get a key at https://aistudio.google.com/apikey and add `export GEMINI_API_KEY=...` to your shell rc.
_notes.exa_endpoint: Uses the advanced endpoint. Only `web_search_advanced_exa` is recommended (per project decision). Auth via Exa's HTTP transport — set up via `claude mcp add ...` if needed.
_notes.slack_atlassian_figma: Independent MCPs. After cloning, run `/mcp` and OAuth each one. Slack requires you to replace `REPLACE_WITH_YOUR_SLACK_CLIENT_ID` with your own Slack app's client ID (dynamic-client-registration). Atlassian and Figma do standard browser-OAuth on first call.
_notes.fork_note: This .mcp.json was sanitized for public-fork use — no tokens, no Sid-specific history. Adjust freely for your own setup.
